hero.title: Welcome to SNF - Sandip Natural Farms
hero.subtitle: Premium Poultry Products & Solutions

about.title: About Us
about.description: SNF - Sandipx Natural Farms is dedicated to providing premium poultry products and sustainable farming solutions. With years of experience, we offer the highest quality chicks, medicines, feed, and equipment.

features.title: Why Choose Us
features.qualityDesc: Best breed selection and health-checked poultry
features.supportDesc: Expert guidance and customer support available
features.experienceDesc: Trusted by thousands of farmers nationwide
features.trainingDesc: Comprehensive training programs for poultry farmers
features.deliveryDesc: Quick and reliable delivery across regions

owner.title: Meet Our Founder
owner.message: With a passion for sustainable poultry farming and a commitment to quality, our founder established SNF to provide farmers with premium products and expert guidance. Our mission is to transform the poultry industry through innovation and dedication.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded over a decade ago, SNF has grown from a small operation to a trusted name in the poultry industry. We believe in sustainable practices, quality assurance, and farmer empowerment.

why.title: Why Poultry Farming?
why.description: Poultry farming offers sustainable livelihood opportunities. With proper guidance and quality inputs, it's a profitable and rewarding venture. SNF is here to support every step of your journey.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive Solutions for Modern Poultry Farming
products.description: High quality poultry chicks for commercial and backyard farming

connect.title: Get In Touch
connect.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
